text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>37. <BIBL><TITLE>Eine Tossanische Bibel</TITLE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":1,"explanation":"Added the closing '>' character to the opening <TITLE> tag, which was missing in the original XML string. The original had '<TITLEEine' instead of '<TITLE>Eine', making the XML malformed. No other corrections were needed as the structure was otherwise valid."}

parsed.explanation: Added the closing '>' character to the opening <TITLE> tag, which was missing in the original XML string. The original had '<TITLEEine' instead of '<TITLE>Eine', making the XML malformed. No other corrections were needed as the structure was otherwise valid.
